meta.name: Adapter8004 v0.0.6 - bindExisting + counterfactual v1 upgrade - Base (TEMPLATE)
meta.description: TEMPLATE - NOT READY TO IMPORT. Generated as part of the audit follow-up to reports/adapter/2026-05-21-adapter8004-v0.0.6-adversarial-audit.md (N-H-01). The `to` is the canonical Base Adapter8004 proxy 0x270d25D2c59A8bcA1B0f40ad95fF7806c0025c27. After the v0.0.6-final implementation is deployed on Base by DeployAdapterImplementation.s.sol (which now refuses to run unless ADAPTER_PROXY_ADDRESS matches block.chainid via MismatchedProxyForChain), replace the placeholder `data` value with the upgradeToAndCall(<base implementation>, 0x) encoding the script prints.
